steps.title: Use the vertex formula
steps.content: The quadratic $y=x^2-18x+29$ opens upward because the coefficient of $x^2$ is positive, so its minimum occurs at the vertex.

steps.title: Find the vertex input
steps.content:
Here, $a=1$ and $b=-18$. Substitute those values:
$$x=-\frac{-18}{2(1)}=\frac{18}{2}=9$$The answer is 9.
